svg.text: GIS-first nationwide Shinkansen · one bundle, two map representations
Low-zoom idea: structural geography, major hubs, calm rail corridors
Higher-zoom idea: service families, clearer branches, denser labels

g.text: • Physical station positions use real lat/lon from the national Shinkansen dataset.
• Corridor and service views come from the same V3 bundle, not from separate hand-drawn maps.
• The next step is to connect this bundle to a real interactive client and timetable view.
